fields.summary: Specifies a color override for a single entry in a font color palette.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` associates a palette entry index with an ARGB replacement color. Use a span of these values with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides> when cloning a typeface to customize its color palette.

The `Color` field stores an `sk_color_t` value, which uses **ARGB** byte order (0xAARRGGBB), matching <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    PaletteIndex = 0,
    PaletteOverrides = overrides,
};
using var cloned = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement ARGB color for the palette entry.
fields.value: An ARGB color value (0xAARRGGBB) used as the replacement for the palette entry at <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

Gets or sets the zero-based index of the palette entry to override.
fields.value: The index of the palette color entry to replace.
